data.content: Implemented src/bin/openrouter-agent.ts: standalone Bun/Node script with CLI args (-p, --model, --output-format stream-json), SSE streaming from OpenRouter API, Claude stream-json event translation. Added bin entry to package.json. 16 unit tests cover arg parsing, SSE translation, and builder functions. All quality gates pass (lint, tsc, tests). Commit: d885cba
